reviews.review_description: I initially thought it was going to be a simple arcade shooting game, but this game is a full blown action adventure with a proper story and campaign. The game has a very cool cartoony artstyle similar to Jurassic World Aftermath, but unlike Jurassic Park the gameplay mechanics are a lot more involved. The gunplay while arcady is surprisingly good, all the weapons are fun to use, there are interesting gadgets, cool boss fights, interesting and varied environments, nice variety of gameplay mechanics with action, stealth, detective sections where you need to explore the environment and interrogate people, and even some puzzle elements in certain parts that require you to make use of your gadgets to proceed. The campaign also has a decent size, and I believe it took me around 7 hours to beat it. My only gripe is that I couldn't find an option to disable the subtitles, and these are presented in a floating popup right in the center of your view, but this is a minor nitpick. The game is great and I'm surprised it has a lower score than DeadpoolVR since I found this game to be a lot better (though shorter than Deadpool, it has better gunplay and a lot more mechanics).

This game is so much fun. I didn't expect much from it since none of the biggest YouTubers cared to review it. But what a game! 

You will feel like one agent of the movies and blow up aliens and deneuralize humans. Besides, every level brings new weapons, gadgets or some gameplay novelty. So it keeps getting more and more dynamic and fun as you play.

There are also well though puzzles to solve using the gadgets you'll get along the way and the background music is spot on.

The graphic are not realistic, but that won't stop you from having fun. Another thing that impressed me is how smooth this game runs on Quest 3, it feels fluid and not a single frame drop has happened throughout the whole single player campaign. It run better than Batman, Walking Dead or any famous game.

10/10 for me!

reviews.review_title: I Really Wanted To Give This 5 Stars
reviews.review_description: First, I want to point out that I really did enjoy my time with the game. I grew up with the movies, cartoon, and comic books. The art style felt like the comic books and the mechanics were really fun. There was a bunch of gadgets to use and upgrades to buy. The only downfall I had with the game was during 2 boss fights. There's a boss at a dance club level that just spikes up the difficulty out of nowhere. My teenagers and I struggled to beat that boss but we did (just barely and it took us many tries over the course of days). That right there had us worried about the rest of the game but the game got back to normal and we made it to the final boss of the game. Now that boss, the difficulty really spiked with him. We still haven't beat the final boss and we've been trying for several weeks. We will randomly try and everytime we lose. There's 3 phases to the fight and we always die at the last phase. Then you have the start the boss battle again from the very beginning. I joined the Discord and read all the tips that I could find but even then, we couldn't beat the last boss. I would encourage the devs to either rebalance or add checkpoints within the battle for those 2 bosses because right now, if we ever do beat that last boss, I don't know if I have it in me to replay the game anytime soon even though I had a great time overall. I would still recommend this game because overall, it was a lot of fun.
Solid game. I wish I could play it through. Keeps crashing at the Olga chase.

reviews.review_title: Big Fan of the Movie and This Game.
reviews.review_description: Its a shame this game came out when a lot of other really good VR games debuted. It almost went under the radar for me, but I was lucky I saw Beardo Benjo's YouTube video titled "Men In Black is Better Than I Expected". And he was right. This MIB game is definitely better than I expected. The missions are fun, I enjoyed the story and the VR gameplay is solid. The game's gun fights especially fun since I was using Provolver Elite haptic pistol (Big recommend). Once I beat the game I was thinking its almost a crime that more VR users arent playing this.  As far as Im concerned this game really is a hidden gem.

First of all, thanks to the YouTube channel @vraimentcoolofficiel and their contest for giving me the opportunity to play this game by winning a key.

It's a nice casual game, quite fun and enjoyable.
The gameplay reminded me of elements of Arizona Sunshine (the humour and the movement), Hubris (weapon and menu style) while graphically, it has the comics-look like Deadpool or the upcoming Ninja turtles. The Immersion and physics part are very basic but the story is interesting.

You have some missions and you go around searching for clues, trying to pass unnoticed (otherwise you use your neuralizer), you have some little gadgets and there are some very easy puzzles. 
It's ok for chilling and it makes me wanna go back sometimes (there's also the multiplayer option but I don't think it works) but I am not sure that I may want to replay it once finished.

reviews.review_title: Very entertaining and a little buggy
reviews.review_description: Right at the very beginning I got stuck and had to reload a checkpoint.  This happened several times during the game.  Sometimes I'm stuck in a box, sometimes a wall, and sometimes just nothing like during the last boss fight.  I was reloading checkpoints unitl I figured out that I could use the teleporter as a workaround.  I would otherwise give it a 5 star.  The game itself is pretty entertaining with some easy puzzles.  The weapons are decent, though holstering them is quite janky.  The holsters seem to go out of place if I turn my body.  Also, trying to use the left holster sometimes results in the weapon going into my wrist which sends it back into inventory.  I didn't see a way to calibrate this.  It's a good game overall that can use some improvements.

I had fun with this game and I am not even a fan of MiB IP. The only thing which I found weird is a lack of visual pose of crouching when a player observes themselves from first person view (there is a way to observe yourself from third person view). A character just partially goes through the ground/floor. But maybe it is a design choice as legs may block a view of interactive elements. Played on Q3.

I think this is a solid game, exceeded expectations. Started out at 4 stars and as it progressed it became 5 for me. Some fun gadgets and environmental variety. Good length. I think there were 8 missions and each one took me roughly an hour. You can do it quicker but I was poking around in every nook and cranny to find collectibles. Graphic style of Jurassic World, my favorite VR game. This is now my 2nd favorite Coatsink game.

If you enjoy Jurassic world aftermath you will like this also.  It has adventure, action, stealth, puzzles and a fun narrated story to keep it interesting.  Simple yet nice graphics with nice audio.  Mechanics are solid with a intuitive tutorial to get you going.  These Devs have a knack for these style games and it is worth a spot in your library.

I don’t understand the mediocre rating on this game as it’s sooo much fun.  I love the cartoon look as it suits the game.  It’s fun, the weapons are cool, and with a fun campaign. I have not experienced any of the glitches that other people  have written about.  I hope there’s a Men in Black 2. 😎👍❤️

The gameplay is fun, and if you've played the Jurassic World Aftermath game, then you'll recognize the art style, which isnt bad. Also they designed the MIB headquarters to be somewhat reminiscent of the original movie. So theres a nice nostalgic feel to it for me, since I watched the original when I was a kid. The gameplay is pretty straightforward, but there seems to be a fair amount to do, along with an interesting story. For a game that was announced out of the blue just a month before release, this is surprisingly good.

When this game released with really no marketing, no lead up, no hype or anything before release; I thought it was just going to be a cash grab on the Men In Black IP. I watched A Wolf in VR play it a little and it looked fun, so I decided to buy it and give it a chance. It's certainly not a perfect game, but it sure is fun. The story is interesting, the gameplay is fun and varied, I enjoyed all of the different gadgets you get to use. It has the normal MIB charm and humor you would expect. It's pretty much the perfect length in my personal opinion. They put way more into this game then I was expecting. If you're a fan of MIB, I highly recommend. Even if you've never seen those movies, it's a fun time.

reviews.review_title: Too buggy: update they fixed it
reviews.review_description: I didn’t want to right this review but I have no choice. I got this game on Christmas hoping it would be good and it was but it kept glitching. I was on the second mission and I accidentally neutralized the wrong person. So I try to restart the game and when I pressed continue it didn’t take me anywhere, it just took me into the background of the loading area were you can select invasion or continue your game making the game unplayable. So I kept restarting the game and it got to a point where I deleted the game and redownloaded it and it still wouldn’t work. I kept trying and trying but it still wouldn’t work. So now they either fix this bug￼ or I get a refund.
True to the Movie reference, attention to small details, puzzle solving, gunfights, bossfights, great story design, vr native controls,This Game nailed all of this.

i really really love this game it was pretty fun but the glitch is really made me mad cuz if my head said died in the middle of a mission in that game i was born at the mission put i will fall in a infinite pit for some reason i couldn't see nothing my whole screen was black and i was still playing so that was a glitch so please whoever made this game fix the glitches it really annoys me

developer_response.body:
Thank you for raising this issue, however we can’t confidently identify the problem you’re describing. It’s best to raise bugs via our discord so we can more easily discuss the steps to replicate what you’re experiencing - https://discord.com/invite/coatsink. 

- COATSINK DEVS

reviews.review_description: Breezy lighthearted fun with surprisingly deep gameplay  mechanics. Cell shaded animation matches the comic book and animated series origins.  Travel to locations, explore, stealth, nuralize civilians, puzzle and shoot to eliminate or capture aliens.  One negative is your hand through non interactive items.

reviews.review_title: Sorry so long but I txt a lot deaf here
reviews.review_description:
Just 1 level and had to come and say what a shock I didn’t expect much caus didnt hear much about it befor not sur why but I like it guys!🤩 reminds me of Jurassic park vr game in the graphics dept. And liked that also. But here’s the change I need caus simply doesn’t work on settings switch but the inventory button on or off doesnt get rid of  inventory automatically and the other is the confusion on jumping down do u hav to go up and down ladders or can u vault over and drop all the way down caus if so I’ve tried don’t let me and the last thing was the gun tutorial when u reload Ihav to push the A or X button twice quickly then releases to reload holding  button down didnt wk but I could b wrong on this part also so if so no biggie Lastly when u pause game if u hav ypur eepons saved for quick grab as in gun and the health spray if u pause game and come bk it puts it bk in inventory anf don’t stay on chest so here we go again  having to open and place everytime again😒so basic combat and very start even on intro was fumbling a lot 😬 and the journal
Thing don’t ek either on or off and it doesn’t feel right if u let your hand down a inch auto shuts and can’t change that either on settings only problems is the controls really and foxing settings to wk actually So tweak it  plz and that beautiful star will appear . BUT loved it other then controls great job so far and can’t wait to get bk in just praying controls and menu settings work soon Keep it up caus got a very fun game and hilarious ! Happy bug smashing devs (😏😆

Finally finished whole campaign!!! Actions are so impressive, and it's getting harder & harder. With such immersive atmosphere, Men In Black: Most Wanted is Coatsink's exhilarating and intriguing game. Graphics reminds me of Shadow Point and Jurassic World. Composer Vince Webb made intense soundtrack. Now I started second round!!!

reviews.review_title: excuse me my lack of faith
reviews.review_description:
I was initially underwhelmed by bits of gameplay footage, it looked like a very basic wave shooter. Nope, it's actually a full blown action-adventure game blending good exploration, shooting action, stealth and puzzles going well beyond just the stealth gameplay from Coatsink's previous movie license Jurassic Park Aftermath.

Even cell-shaded graphics look very good, among the best. Locations are vibrant and unique in the headset like video footage can't really showcase. There are NPCs to interact with now and more than one enemy after you as in their previous game. They deliver great ambiance and dialogues are as funny as in the movies. They definitely know how to do a good fanjob.

gadgets and guns are super fun to deal with and they have upgrades. You also have a main menu easily accessible and 2 pockets in your suit for easy access to your favorite items, like a gun and deneuralizer. And let's not forget cool AR sunglasses that help you check objectives and other data, plus highlight important items in view. 

Very underrated game in this busy season...
I had early access to this game so played many hours, it hits the men in black theme and has some great moment. If you want my full review lookup 'VRLAD' on youtube and it will be there

Really enjoyed this. It does help to be a fan of the franchise as I am, but it was also really nice to play a game that isn’t broken at release. 

Lots of little fan service moments throughout the game that I won’t spoil here. I love the cel shaded artstyle giving a comic book aesthetic. Just good good stuff. 

Check out UploadVR’s website for my full review.

Went through deck warehouse once then got stuck later on in the game. started back through then half the doors which I should be able to open with the pull doesn't show the outline can't open them. Once I got close a wall completely froze the game. if you ever quit and go back you start all over in the assignment your in. Like the game just can't get through it due to bugs.

This game is very special very playable very exciting and filled with fun and actually shooting those guns are Filled with absolute Bliss and joy. Thanks to the developers so much for fixing the co-op mode and I'm really hoping for a full campaign in the future but yeah thanks a lot for the love and hard hard work this  game is beautiful and they deserve a metal a award for this men in black .  and it's so wonderful and I really do think that everybody should get this game. This game is a 5.5 exactly and will be a 6.0 if they ever make it a full campaign other than that this game is one of the best games on meta is absolutely brilliant  .get this game alot of hard work and care  . Like nothing I have ever seen .

reviews.review_title: M.I.B. is B.A.D. (in a good way)
reviews.review_description: Most reviewers on the internet only show the Story Line portion of this game, which is really fun, but they leave out the "Invasion" part of this game which is like a "horde" mode where you have to accomplish certain missions in different locations while taking on a mob of space aliens.   This portion is also a Multiplayer portion of the game. This is one of the few Movies to VR games that is actually very GOOD!  The Story line is fun, figuring out puzzles, shooting space aliens and catching the bad guys plus you get to move around freely inside the M.I.B. Headquarters.   The invasion part is fantastic, completing make different types of missions while taking on a horde of Space aliens.

I bought this because Beardo Benjo said so and I have really enjoyed the gameplay. The campaign is good and the Coop (invasion) is a great horde mode type map. Love it.

No idea why the people that gave this a 1 could not find Coop, it’s obvious.

I’m really loving this game. But every time I finish the level with a creature that you have to kill before you can reach Olga my game crashes.  It started at 10 times at least and I’m not gonna do it again… so Dev’s if you even read this could you please get back to me and tell me what I can do?

developer_response.body:
Great to hear that you’re enjoying the game! We’re not aware of the issue you’re describing, so please reach out on Discord where you can report bugs and we can better work to resolve your issue  - https://discord.com/invite/coatsink. 

- COATSINK DEVS

reviews.review_description:
As a kid, I loved the idea of being a member of the MIB. This game captures that feeling, complete with a very similar layout for the headquarters, as well as some classic cameos.

That being said, after having fun with it for a while, I closed the game, and when I came back to it, I got stuck in an endless loop of 

Selecting "continue"
Loading screen 
Spawn in an area of the main menu that was further away from the main menu screen.

This process repeated over five times, with no success in getting past the main menu.

developer_response.body:
Really sorry to hear about the problem you’re hitting, we’re pleased to say that we’ve addressed this in our latest patch (1.1.2).
Hopefully this resolves everything for you and you can get back to enjoying the game!

- COATSINK DEVS

reviews.review_description:
This was not on my radar, not really my style of graphics …or so I thought, I really am enjoying this game, great gun mechanics, puzzles are a nice mix, a proper Men in Black nostalgia feeling.
At the price it’s a good buy.

Attention: The Elevator bug on level 3 that some reviews note, is fixed. The game has got a big patch and several issues are fixed and polished as of now.

I expected a simple shooty shooty arcade game but it is way deeper than expected. Stealthy incognito investigations, npc interactions, light puzzles mixed with shoot outs action. Weapon upgrades and gadgets, great voice acting and a very alive game world. Fun one for sure.

reviews.review_title: Really good, not a wave shooter!
reviews.review_description:
The game was really good. I especially liked some of the gameplay like the gadgets, and that sequence where you have to pick up the energy sphere and take it with you was really well thought out and a good design choice.

I really liked the stealth missions, and the story was excellent. The combat was also good, though it was a struggle sometimes to grab what I wanted. 

This game definitely exceeded my expectations. It's not just a wave shooter as I was expecting. You have stealth missions, and you have missions where you take down bosses and you can even stealth kill enemies.

Really good game.

Right from the start of the game , absolute magic , the art style of the game for the metaquest Looks and works so good. The gameplay of the game moves very swiftly and is very exciting. None of the puzzles are super hard. It's just an absolute blast to play this game. Every corner I turned , I was just Admire the beauty of the world. If you like men in black this game is a wonderful nod to the movies, I'm sorry I don't have anything really bad to say about the game. Is definitely worth the money and there's a lot of replayability in the armory. To the devs of the game. Okay, guys, now I'm ready for scooby doo or a Ghostbusters, Spiderman or any game that can use this art style that you used in this game. It's amazing Can't wait to get back into the world. Thank you for all your late night's  and just All the hard work you guys did to make this Masterpiece. You guys are absolute magicians.
It's a pretty fun game!

reviews.review_title: Game is good but games is bug
reviews.review_description:
The game is cool. story line and theme is great the action is and shooting to but is bugging out
So far through this story. It's not just the 3rd level it's also the fourth
When you're getting sign or soon, it's an underground city and talk around and stuff. You'll go to a certain club. This club will have a certain laser green security system. My guess is, you gotta get through it. But here's the catch. When I got there
And want not even so close. It's only engage in lockdown procedure. You can disengage the locking suit and try again. That does, but some reason it happens. Every single time and I'm not even touching it. And the craziest thing, when I put it, always my virtual hand behind me. It's still even in cages. The lockdown, it's quite crazy. Crazy.
So yeah, do old people plus people that have reviewed in about these bones.Take their advice.Don't buy this until the developer is fix the bugs on all levels.And the ones that have been reviewed.

developer_response.body:
We’re sorry to hear that you’ve been facing issues. We’re pleased to say that we’ve recently pushed Patch v1.1.0 which should provide a better experience. Thank you for playing!

- COATSINK DEVS

reviews.review_description: it is a really good game and the shooting's pretty fun but one time i loaded in but all it did was just make me stay on the menu area but i couldn't use the select screen so all they have to do is fix this and then it would be five stars

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the kind words, we’re really glad to hear that you’re enjoying the game despite the issue you’ve hit. We’re pleased to say that the problem has been resolved in our latest patch (1.1.2). Feel free to reach out on Discord if you face any more issues -  https://discord.com/invite/coatsink

- COATSINK DEVS

reviews.review_description:
Two reasons,

Beardo Benjo said it's awesome.

Always wanted to be an MIB agent as a kid growing up through the '90s. 

Suggestion-
Please make a DLC campaign relate to a two player campaign story.

Invasion mode have four players with more objective missions.

The laser grid sections on top of the gas station and when you first enter the club are VERY GLITCHY I'm currently stuck on top of the gas station cause after I use the teleport gadget if I turn to look at the next button to throw the gadet I either get instant killed or take alot of damage even tho I'm standing on the button and the button

Very frustrating so just a heads up

developer_response.body:
Sorry to hear you’re having issues. It would be good to know more as it’s not something we’re aware of or have seen before. The best way to help would be via discord, feel free to join and report your issue and we can see if we can better identify the problem you’re having - https://discord.com/invite/coatsink

- COATSINK DEVS

reviews.review_title: Can’t get thru last boss battle
reviews.review_description: Not everyone is a shooter up ￼gamer I thought this game was for everybody, but that last boss battle you need a save point because it’s impossible to get through for those of us who are not gamers

developer_response.body:
There’s currently no plans to re-balance that particular sequence but we’re happy to give some guidance to help you out if you’d like to join our Discord - https://discord.com/invite/coatsink. Really appreciate the feedback and thank you for playing!

- COATSINK DEVS

reviews.review_title: Please fix this bug, I hate it.
reviews.review_description: It is a good game except for one thing. On the third level I was going into the elevator to go to floor 16, but when I hit the button to go up it froze for a second and my arms were stretched and it didn't take me there and I couldn't press or grab anything and I can not do anything to fix it. So please fix this bug I know I'm not the only one having this issue.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the kind words and for highlighting this issue, we’ve been working hard to address this and we’re pleased to say that a fix has been delivered in Patch v1.1.0.

- COATSINK DEVS

reviews.review_description:
I bought this game thinking it would be an on the rails shooter or something simple... there was virtually zero marketing and came out of nowhere.. but shame on me bc they put work into this. I really enjoyed this Mib game.. it's story driven, puzzles (pretty easy but fun) shooting feels good.. upgrades to weapons..I had a smile on my face this entire game. I'm 40 and was a fan of the movies FYI
.. but this was really enjoyable... and i play nearly every shooter game. Well done guys!

This is a really fun shooter game. The devs seem to have fixed most of the bugs however there are still a few (my gun went invisible for most of level 3 being the most annoying one I noticed)

Great if you like shooters or the MIB franchise

Finished the game yesterday. A lot of fun to be had in this experience. The cell shaded art style was great, gadgets and weapons were nicely done, story gets very interesting as you progress further. If your a fan of M.I.B this game should be added to your library.

Figured out how to play co op. Got it to work. Still not crazy about the game. No weapons, you have to throw boxes at the shooter. Keep failing the third wave. Cant get enough money to buy a gun.Really need to start out with weapons.

developer_response.body:
Sorry to hear you’ve had issues with coop. You should have access to the pistol from your inventory from the start of Invasion mode. We do recommend that you play the start of the main game, as crucial mechanics are introduced there. If you have any questions or further issues, please feel free to join our discord - https://discord.com/invite/coatsink

- COATSINK DEVS

reviews.review_description: i think its fun
Would've been a perfect game for Quest Achievements. Maybe in a future update?
This is a really good game I still haven't finished it but so far its so. Good
Absolutely brilliant
On level 3 my neuralizer doesn’t work and won’t let me use the quick time thing it’s just blank please fix this

developer_response.body:
Thank you for raising this, we’re pleased to say that we’ve managed to identify and fix the issue. As of Patch V1.1.1, it should no longer be a problem. If any more issues are encountered, feel free to flag them on our Discord - https://discord.com/invite/coatsink
Otherwise, we hope you enjoy the game!
- COATSINK DEVS

reviews.review_description: great game but there is a fatal bug on mission 2 where you cant use the 2nd elevator without it glitching

developer_response.body:
We’re pleased to say that this issue has now been resolved as of Patch v1.1.0. We’re really glad you’re enjoying the game so far despite this though.

- COATSINK DEVS

reviews.review_description: This is not “comfortable” and i didn’t try it until it was too late for a refund. Lesson learned. I have no way to tell if it’s fun. Sorry.
Unfortunately too many glitches to enjoy the game.

developer_response.body:
We're sorry that you've encountered some issues while playing. We are pleased to say that we have recently released Patch v1.1.0 which should improve your experience. Thank you for playing!

- COATSINK DEVS

reviews.review_description: Great fun
